title: ballota hirsuta var. maroccana
intro: Ballota hirsuta var. maroccana, also known as Moroccan hairy betony, is a subspecies of the Ballota hirsuta plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Moroccan hairy betony include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a restful night's sleep, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Moroccan hairy betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from colds and coughs to skin conditions and digestive issues.
